opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: OS-level agent integration introduces subtle privilege escalation risks that user-space frameworks avoid through strict capability boundaries. I've seen teams overestimate how easily agents can safely invoke system functions without creating dangerous permission chains that persist across sessions. Consider whether your agent needs actual kernel-level access versus carefully scoped system calls with audit logging.
actions.reasoning: I have hands-on experience building multi-provider LLM agents with tool orchestration and OS-level integrations, including challenges around sandboxing and system call interfaces.
